data.title: 春暉公益 Chunhui Public Welfare丨王力宏探訪貴州兒童福利院 Leehom  Visits a Children's Welfare Home in Guizhou
data.description: 前幾天我去看望了福利院的孩子們，現場跟他們共同創作了一首新歌《我要的青春》。琴弦振動，他們笑得那麼開懷，眼睛亮亮的， ...From Nanchang to Sanya, 11 months, 19 cities, 57 shows, thank you for your support and companionship. We've left unforgettable ...Beneath the stage and beyond the spotlight, behind every perfect performance lies the hard work of hundreds of staff members, ...Here comes the final chapter, "Resolution"! We spent the first weekend of 2026 with everyone in Zhuji, releasing all our tension ...30 years ago, I stepped into the spotlight with my first album The Love Rival Beethoven. I was just a clueless college kid back then ...Last night, in the middle of the concert, I got the wildest FaceTime call from the past AND the future! Thank you all for the BEST ...The third act, "transition," is a progression of the story and, more importantly, a closing of the distance between us. We gather ...In 「The Best Place」, the Rising Action section is the most emotionally resonant segment. We're joyful yet lonely, romantic all the ...
